Name: Bruiser
Description: Melee alpha strikes inflict +1m1l

Name: David
Description: Always attacks capes at a total modifier of +5 before non stat penalties.

Name: EMT
Description: Has advantage when suppressing battle wounds. Can stabilize trauma patients.

Name: Doctor
Description: Can treat people for long term diseases or effects if they have the resources and time

Name: Pickpocket
Description: Can steal anything not being held from an adjacent person. If successful said target does not notice.

Name: Robber
Description: Can pick up valuable items as part of movement. Weight and capacity for these items are halved.

Name: Techie
Description: Good at opening and understanding technology, (+4 to rolls)

Name: Hacker
Description: Can focus on securing a base against attacks (requiring 24+ to break).

Name: Trainee
Description: Gets 3 pips in any skill their stats allow.

Name: Tactician
Description: Can spend their partial action to grant another goon a partial action.

Name: Parkourist
Description: Can roll a contested acrobatics check to escape.

Name: Urban Monkey
Description: Can hang from walls and ceilings if arms are free.

Name: Escape Driver
Description: +2 to rolls meant to throw off a tailing vehicle.

Name: Handyman
Description: Can repair one module each week.

Name: Mechanic
Description: Can repair one vehicle each week.

Name: Dealer
Description: Increases income by 100. Capping at 4 per drug lab.

Name: Chemist
Description: Drug selling rewards 50% more cash. Does not stack.

Name: Artist
Description: Adds $50 to income.

Name: Mortician
Description: Can determine the cause of death of a body. Including noting parahuman results.

Name: Martial Artist
Description: Unarmed melee attacks inflict K.O.

Name: Janitor
Description: Can clean up blood and human waste from a room once a week.

Name: Fence
Description: Can sell the crap you get for untraced cash.

Name: Scout
Description: +2 to awareness rolls against sneaks.

Name: Gambler
Description: Each week flip a coin. On heads you win $1400, on tails you lose $1000

Name: Journalist
Description: Can paint you in a better light for an uncoming newspost you are aware of once a month. Does not stack.

Name: Actor
Description: Raises difficulty of streetsmarts 3rd pip to DC20

Name: Clandestine
Description: Raises difficulty of streetsmarts 3rd pip to DC22

Name: Loyalist
Description: +2 against interrogation attempts.

Name: Fanatic
Description: Immune to all but the first two pips of threaten. +4 against interrogation attempts.

Name: Arsonist
Description: Has an effectively infinite personal supply of molotovs

Name: Butler
Description: +1 to social rolls when RPing in your base with this mook. Has minor tools at hand

Name: Bouncer
Description: Can threaten civilians without a roll

Name: Enforcer
Description: Counts as a cape for threaten where it would benefit. +2 to threaten rolls

Name: Hawkeye
Description: Makes AoOs at +2

Name: Sentinel
Description: Makes AoOs at +2. Can make AoOs for shifting without this bonus

Name: Sewer Rat
Description: Can infiltrate bases with the Sewer flaw without a roll(must still roll to sneak around inside)

Name: Warden
Description: Can guard multiple holding cells at once

Name: Pidgeon Feeder
Description: +2 to rolls to look completely innocuous

Name: Hauler
Description: Can move at normal speed while carrying heavy loads

Name: Fencer
Description: When attacking with a single sword/greatsword, gain +2 to hit and +2ap

Name: Slugger
Description: Nonlethal. Gain +2 KB on alpha strikes. Can use brawn for threaten

Name: Cockroach
Description: Can reroll conc once per fight

Name: Messenger
Description: On failing conc by 2 or less, does not go unconscious. Instead spends future turns running away

Name: Contortionist
Description: Can escape standard bindings with a DC16 dex check

Name: Courier
Description: Expendable. When lost to anything less than Stage 3 consequences you do not suffer penalties

Name: Forger
Description: Can fake IDs and other paperwork with deception opposed by scrutinize

Name: Crier
Description: Can rile up civilians with a charm roll, 1 civilian for every 2 points above 14.

Name: Preacher
Description: Can rile up unaffiliated civilians

Name: Flagbearer
Description: May spend their standard to grant all mooks +1 to hit on their next attack

Name: Sniper
Description: Owns a sniper rifle. Can spend a full round action to gain +4 to hit a target next round as long as LoS is not broken.

Name: Infiltrator
Description: Once a week can roll steath against the awareness of one faction's guard mooks. Learns intell about specific base if successful. If not, must attempt to flee.

Name: Interogator
Description: +4 against verbal deception.

Name: Anti-Rioter
Description: When wielding a riot shield, gain 2 shield specs and can wield batons with FTW.

Name: Demolitionist
Description: AoE grenades and rockets expand by 1 square.

Name: Counter Terrorist
Description: Has access to nondamaging grenades and can throw them as a partial action when wielding a machine pistol.

Name: Lawyer
Description: Once per month can pay 20k to force a news board post to be rewritten in a more negative light. Cannot stack
